channel.title: SHEL — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on SHEL (Shell) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED SHEL (-30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed SHEL in Q4 2025 · 6.1% of portfolio. Taking Shell profits.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)
